title: Data Lineage Record
description: Complete audit trail of data element transformation from origin to final state, ensuring unbroken chain of custody and governance compliance.

system_version.description: Version of the LLM assistant system (e.g., '1.0.0')

lineage_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this lineage chain (ULID or UUID v4)

data_flow.description: Ordered sequence of transformation stages applied to the data element

stage.description: Sequential stage number in processing pipeline

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format with millisecond precision

element_id.description: Unique identifier for the data element at this stage

source.description: Identifier of upstream element feeding this stage

custodian.description: Service or component responsible for this stage

output_reference.description: Element ID produced as output of this stage

rules_applied.description: List of governance rules applied at this stage

parameters.description: Optional configuration parameters for this stage

storage_location.description: URI or identifier of final storage location

retention_expiry.description: Timestamp when this record may be lawfully deleted

deletion_method.description: Method by which record will be destroyed after retention period

access_restrictions.description: Roles authorized to access this lineage record

cryptographic_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the entire lineage document (canonicalized JSON)

metadata.description: Optional metadata about this lineage record
